exploration_notes: CSS calc() in Firefox is parsed by Servo (Rust) in specified/calc.rs, with the generic resolution algorithm in generics/calc.rs (handling NaN, infinity, overflow in arithmetic operations like Sum, Product, MinMax, Clamp, Round, ModRem). The computed value resolution occurs in computed/length_percentage.rs (CalcLengthPercentage::resolve) which applies AllowedNumericType clamping and NaN normalization. The C++ side consumes these via FFI: ServoStyleConstsInlines.h provides LengthPercentage::Resolv
